summary: RETEST of InventoryIntel after fixes from iteration_24. ALL 4 issues from iteration_24 are now RESOLVED. Logged in as super_admin admin@erp.com, walked all 7 InventoryIntel tabs (valuation, aging, dead-stock, movers, idle, reorder, import) — every pane renders cleanly with NO error-boundary-fallback and ZERO TypeError console errors. Tab-switch race (aging→idle→movers→aging at 600ms intervals) passes — no crash at any switch. Bulk Import end-to-end works: CSV upload returns 200 with summary {created:2, updated:0, errors:0}, intel-import-result block renders, intel-import-open-valuation button is present, and clicking it switches to the valuation tab where the imported rows (Retest Item 1, Retest Item 2) appear. DeadStock duplicate-key React warnings are GONE. ProcurementIntel regression: all 4 tabs (vendors, budgets, reservations, audit) load OK. Sidebar regression: both nav-inventory-intel and nav-procurement-intel are visible. InventoryIntel success_rate now 100% (was 73%).

minor.issue: 3x 401 console errors on initial page bootstrap (likely pre-auth probes before cookie restore) — cosmetic, also flagged in iteration_24

passed_checks: Login as super_admin succeeds and lands on /app
intel-tab-aging → intel-pane-aging OK (NO CRASH — null-guard data?.buckets fix verified)
intel-tab-dead-stock → intel-pane-dead-stock OK (NO duplicate-key React warnings — composite key fix verified)
intel-tab-idle → intel-pane-idle OK (NO CRASH — null-guard data?.items fix verified)
Tab-switch race aging→idle→movers→aging at 600ms intervals — NO crash at any step (data-shape guards working)

Bulk Import: POST /api/inventory-intel/import.csv returned 200 (correct CSV columns: item_code,name,category,unit,opening_quantity,rate,store_location,batch,serial_no,vendor_name,asset_tag,reorder_level,min_stock,max_stock)
intel-import-result block renders with 'Created 2 · Updated 0 · Errors 0' Stat cards
intel-import-open-valuation button is visible when errors=0
Clicking intel-import-open-valuation switches to valuation tab; imported TEST_INTEL_R1/R2 rows visible in valuation table (Retest Item 1: 10 nos @ ₹50; Retest Item 2: 5 nos @ ₹100)
ProcurementIntel: pintel-tab-vendors, pintel-tab-budgets, pintel-tab-reservations, pintel-tab-audit — all OK
Zero TypeError/Cannot-read/Cannot-convert console errors throughout entire walk
critical_code_review_comments: Importer.upload() does not call setResult on error path — when backend returns 4xx (e.g., bad CSV columns), the user only sees a toast and the in-page result block stays hidden. Consider always rendering an inline error card on exception so partial failures with structured error rows are visible without re-uploading.

Importer template instructions list 14 specific CSV columns. Recommend adding a sample row inside the downloaded template (already done via /import-template endpoint — verified template button present) and a small validation hint near the file input.
401 noise on page bootstrap (3x) — investigate auth bootstrap order; harmless but pollutes logs and may confuse on-call.

success_rate.backend: not retested in this iteration (GREEN per iteration_21)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (11 of 11 tabs across InventoryIntel + ProcurementIntel render cleanly; bulk import end-to-end works including Open Valuation handoff)

seed_data_creation: Imported 2 rows via bulk import CSV: TEST_INTEL_R1 (Retest Item 1, 10 nos @ ₹50, ₹500 total) and TEST_INTEL_R2 (Retest Item 2, 5 nos @ ₹100, ₹500 total). Visible in valuation pane after import. Main agent may wish to clean up these TEST_ prefixed rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: InventoryIntel + ProcurementIntel pages are fully working. Iteration_24's 4 issues (Aging crash, Idle crash, Import-result missing, DeadStock duplicate keys) all closed. The fixes in /app/frontend/src/pages/InventoryIntel.jsx (data?.<field> guards on all sub-components, removal of onUploaded auto-redirect, explicit intel-import-open-valuation button, composite keys) are verified. No further frontend testing needed for these pages.
rca_of_the_issue: Iteration_24 root-causes confirmed and fixed: (1) Tab-switch race where parent `data` held prior tab's shape allowed sub-components past `if (!data)` truthy check and into field-access crashes — fixed by switching every sub-component's guard from `if (!data)` to `if (!data?.<expected_field>)`. (2) Bulk Import 'result missing' was caused by auto-redirect on success (onUploaded fired and immediately switched away from import tab before result rendered) — fixed by removing auto-redirect and adding explicit intel-import-open-valuation handoff button. (3) DeadStock duplicate-key React warning resolved via composite key `${r.id}-${i}` (also applied to Importer error rows).
